scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: अब बिना किसी डर के English speaking practice करो। [Now practice English speaking without any fear.] AI tutor से बात करो और अपनी गलतियों पर तुरंत feedback पाओ। [Talk to the AI tutor and get instant feedback on your mistakes.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a clear, encouraging value proposition for English speaking practice.
- Highlights the core feature: AI-driven instant feedback to build confidence.
- Replaces the competitor's 'free IELTS' angle with Supernova's practical, fear-free daily speaking focus.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA
Practice English Speaking Daily
SUPERNOVA
4:48
What do you like to do on holiday?

brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: [Removed to align with Supernova's premium model]
